segments.text: Good afternoon to all of you, let's start with an introduction just like we did yesterday until Shri Mataji comes.
Today I'm going talk a little bit more about what could be called our subtle body or inner body
which is drawn in the scheme for this painting
From this scheme, we can understand the relationship between these three levels that we were talking about yesterday.
These are actually 3 levels of our consciousness and perception
Three levels of our knowledge about reality, which are the physical or material level.
That other intermediate level that we called the psychic and is formed by the mental,
ideas and emotions –the emotional–
And then a more subtle level to what was known as the spiritual level
The three forms if you want by the same kind
of something, energy or matter as we want to call it.
But they actually form three different worlds
that are not rigidly separated worlds
but rather three zones in which
all the continuous energy is divided
and presented at various density levels.
In reality this communicates us with things
different from the world.
It's no longer what we touch
that what we feel or think are obviously different things.

so yes indeed there's a difference between a chair
with an affectionate feeling of fear or whatever
We do find a real difference among these two levels in reality
There was another level which is what yesterday called the spiritual level
So the relationship between these three levels, of course they are interrelated because it is the same thing...
...can be understood from this scheme.
And in fact not only can we understand that there's a relation among those three levels within us
but also through the general aspect
of the wider evolution of all humanity where we are immersed and part of ourselves.
